extortion.description: [AI generated] Perroneandsons.com is a food distribution company based in New Orleans, Louisiana. They specialize in providing quality food ingredients to restaurants, hotels, and other businesses in the food industry. With a wide range of products including seafood, poultry, dairy, produce, and specialty items, they pride themselves on a strict focus on quality, freshness, and customer satisfaction. Their expertise comes from decades of experience in the food business.
